name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Governor Walz the Next Andrew Cuomo?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_radical_retarge&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Things are unwinding quickly for New York's Governor Andrew Cuomo. It was revealed late last week that his Administration lied about the number of deaths in nursing homes. At one point during the pandemic, Cuomo actually had COVID positive patients transferred into the long term care facilities. Sound familiar? Governor Walz had the same policy in Minnesota! Did you know that 80% of Minnesota [COVID deaths came from nursing homes](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=dFl0aMevq38wGRVomXVimtNyZd9RA5JK-xkWfTjK292yd5rVAZrvZypwob8dNiabuhg1rs5r9jMIxhxiu27a2FN50fj2ZRlKlD_SwFEIJ0_mJryd5EChHPBHxlcR57-ON4NcIMt6R2NbRg6ssJFEvEKwmgfWKwZeHRu8Vwn6ODMiAakmJovD5pH6QGVbyf3BGEw5EvvbAxdZBesyRRxTyOjNwHgQDpw4cb-N06vdYweA_iFn7iShl8xiYhbbENxv2s3GWqnQuHkQ4vowT7i4DA&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_radical_retarge&n=2)? Meanwhile, both Walz and Cuomo quarantined young healthy people in their homes leading to rising levels of depression. And both governors completely crushed their small business economies. So is it any shocker to read this headline:
## 14 Democrats in New York Senate Want to End Governor Cuomo's Emergency Powers
That's right, 14 Democrats in the New York Senate are calling for an [End to Governor Cuomo's Emergency Powers](https://www.action4liberty.com/14_democrats_in_ny_senate_end_cuomo_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_radical_retarge&n=3) for the handling and misrepresentation of his COVID response. There should be an equal condemnation of Governor Walz' mishandling of COVID AND his ABUSE OF POWER. But the media and vulnerable Democrats are silent!
## You could say, Democrats like Rep Julie Sandstede are more radical than a New York Democrat.
Sandstede has betrayed the trust of her voters by protecting Governor Walz' Emergency Powers. Rep Sandstede has made numerous references recently to "restoring the co-equal branch of government", but so far has fell short of voting to restore our democratic process. She really is **more radical than a New York Democrat**. Want to know what her voters think about Walz' Emergency Powers? We know first hand because a little over a week ago we rented a home, and deployed a team of doorknockers and operators in her district. They are chatting with hundreds of Julie's voters every day! We are finding that an overwhelming number of them side with us on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. In fact, only a measly 24% of voters we talked to actually support Walz' powers. The vast majority of them are not happy to hear how Julie has betrayed their trust and is more radical than a New York Democrat. Our team is making things crystal clear. Julie Sandstede either gets on board with Ending Walz' Emergency Powers, or she will never get re-elected. And we aren't stopping with just her voters. We are hiring more door knockers to reach voters in the districts of other vulnerable Democrats as well. And this hasn't been an easy task. Here's the weather report from Hibbing on Monday morning: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/14_democrats_in_ny_senate_end_cuomo_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_radical_retarge&n=4) But that won't stop us from talking to every voter in these districts. Politicians like Julie Sandstede can continue voting worse than a New York Democrat, but she'll never get re-elected again. It's time politicians like her do the right thing, and End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all.
## **Did you know that Julie Sandstede only won her election by 30 votes?**
Action 4 Liberty means business. We're not just another political group that writes useless papers or hosts pointless events. We spring into Action and apply REAL PRESSURE on politicians who are attacking our liberty. Instead of going to Big Special Interest or the Political Class to fund our operations, we go directly to you. This is the way for you and me to fight against the Swamp! **But we can't hire our doorknockers, pay for their fuel, rent their home, or print the flyers without your help. Will you pitch in $100?** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_radical_retarge&n=5 "Support Our Field Operations") [Support Our Field Operations](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_radical_retarge&n=6)
---
**What makes Action 4 Liberty different than most other groups in this state is that we refuse to quit - we owe it to you and all our supporters to find a way to win. We can't allow our system of government to be hijacked by these politicians any longer.**
With Governor Cuomo's Emergency Powers on the cusp of termination, we **[MUST DOUBLE DOWN](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_radical_retarge&n=7)** on our efforts here to End Walz' Emergency Powers in Minnesota.
The media "experts" are telling us the "worst days" of the pandemic are ahead of us. That means Governor Walz is going to shut down our businesses, quarantine healthy young people, and take kids out of schools again. We need to STOP that from happening!
[Help us keep the pressure](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_radical_retarge&n=8) on vulnerable Democrats in the Minnesota House. New York has 14 Democrats on board...we ONLY need 4!
By moving Action 4 Liberty up north, we are making these politicians' lives miserable because they are hearing from voters, business owners, neighbors and friends around the clock. Our team is identifying swing voters every day.
We're also get messages out to voters like:
## Julie Sandstede - More Radical than a New York Democrat
Our efforts have been effective already. Local media [reports](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=xfBjYNknhSk-NbyyQS3du-qjmV0qBseqeSM8XNE2hT09z9yWHhnhVUPABmQ0UtYhXyac2KARbmUVr9ez4FZeePWsRXmd2IcGHbr7UKfNMGOlFZov8G0KuQgkXbLzfar8PW-vNCTc_hnbMgV8Map04g&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_radical_retarge&n=9) that Julie Sandstede's virtual townhall on Saturday was dominated by questions on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. We were able to organize petition signers in her district to attend her virtual townhall...and things did not go well for her.
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/rep_sandstede_dances_around_votes_on_ending_walz_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_radical_retarge&n=10)
Let's keep the pressure on Julie and other vulnerable Democrats. It's time to End Walz' Emergency Powers.
**Can I count on you to help us make things more painful for these politicians. Please help us with a[donation of $100. If that's too steep, $50 or $25 can go along way to holding them accountable. Want to help even more, consider a one time donation of $500. We need you on board!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_radical_retarge&n=11)**
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
**P.S. Like Governor Andrew Cuomo, Governor Walz moved COVID positive patients into nursing homes where 80% of COVID deaths came from in this state. 14 Democrats in New York want to remove Governor Cuomo's Emergency Powers because of his destructive COVID response. Meanwhile in Minnesota, politicians like Rep Julie Sandstede are showing us they are MORE RADICAL than a New York Democrat by protecting Governor Walz' same Emergency Powers. That's why we deployed a team of doorknockers and operators to Hibbing to reach every voter in Sandstede's district to let them know how she is voting. And we won't stop with just her district. Politicians have a choice: either get on board with us or they won't get re-elected next year. Instead of going to the political class to raise money (they hate us!), we go directly to YOU. Please help us with a[donation of $100. If that's too steep, $50 or $25 can go along way to holding them accountable. Want to help even more, consider a one time donation of $500. We need you on board!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_radical_retarge&n=12)**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_radical_retarge&n=13).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_radical_retarge&n=14).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=more_radical_retarge&n=15), software for leaders.

body:
White House press secretary Jen Psaki recently said the administration is ”not in a rush” to counter China.

White House press secretary Jen Psaki recently said the administration is "not in a rush" to counter China. Democrats and the Biden administration fail to see the significant threat China poses to freedom and democracy in the west.

China has worked for years to undermine American leadership and stability, and now the Biden administration is choosing to sit back and watch. At the same time, China continues to advance its dangerous agenda.

[**STAND UP TO CHINA - SIGN THE PETITION**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WYMDHnjlvfk2TzVQ7IzNhOlV-zWYRAdbS_ImOu_IIphNgaH7KraIvcLHkC_IKtTGa6JicIVhGDMU8cob4wiSd0tZNNsEvmpncR5zYp-tdR8H_0U1et1sKb1gbCloc007-Pz0cy9FgeQPUNsIzIiGd65-hENp1SWid8vqWMt188jJDbxM-xuTN19xIoUUYzyneklk2YM-tznqMlDm6Y8vnSv6QQSUk-Q9jR12zdDxQ-emvsXR3KgnwMhSGx0pydUQf6smBN4AIiwO4B-rZ9cBsv32A0snphOxQxawNJI24yN5OjzZlOYb8OU_pdvo3pK0RpPu-T7D2fyG9ziDDcIcSpzeLYtXuqHyGaJdhJMu6Z_cT8h0xv97kAjMdbcYPT18aRjs78yMgjQ=&c=sX07-ksTMNBnGQIy05wvRv3L3ZgN4G0vgaO_iLwkKajn4kbBB4iqng==&ch=6uRaHl7Utjygx2JdB4to3b5AsMfwCW_jKsH3TnFmR9TRZnLGRj5FgQ==)

President Biden is surrendering to teacher's unions. After the CDC said our kids can return to classrooms, the president's "bold and ambitious" plan is 1 day a week. 1 day a week will not help parents or our children who are falling behind.

**I need your help showing Joe Biden and the teachers unions that our children are off limits for their politics.**

Will you donate today to help me and my team stand up to the teachers unions who are holding our children's education hostage.
[STAND UP TO TEACHERS UNIONS - DONATE NOW](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F78GfBIPv69afp8YFe3bYTeUUpLNMCOqjzZb9HXBHVVLUQ-Besz_4rn7yYb1qWqU3waYp4yzQxo95F71BqHmEN0ejnFM7GsAsRcIYEtXnno2u_mtp8S3E72V7STn13jeAfG3IhxueGT7itMlL1rpPrRK6l9I1usx6dmvCk-oSv9t14mFcweiU96HZAttywBrIk9Fu5QUdDvlQ9X3sc-MtO_HFG3rKQy1W0BW819UfVwL81FRW51n3TZYg3vPL34nTzlbjCxjF2S-xQH5VGyiQJfvi8frThU2Wxb3RMJuJ7d9w5oOozMXQSQQBLCSJgxEuWaDx1SPXuuACp7pK1TE7jGav4hbC8QCL6ee6eUdRxtLELkDANWY_RQ4mDLeSgTFBLR2JmexiO1jWlP_yA6prb-hIaNWugcWu73PAcsqDbRiYrQkIQ07eJ6qRO_214lTEv-cFuYUIpmEJw5KN41VxLt7-n8ZpdJJW6il_aGFt24=&c=6q4wtTP6WQqYa1maeOHNuY4bdWbBqPBujeIdaUHOci2LOAVE1rUELA==&ch=gu4YnzJ2bQj7KDTjoy1Wlx0pWURQuK2212bUqQfjblT0Kp0g9RiNXg==)

Friend, Californians and businesses are fleeing the Golden State as fast as they can -- and for good reason.
* Billions in fraud
* The highest taxes in the nation
* Thousands of taxpayer dollars wasted
* A lack of affordable housing
* A worsening homelessness crisis
* Red Tape that regulates small businesses into failure

The Democrats still can't believe that Republicans won back this seat in 2020. They already have their sights set on flipping this seat from red to blue in 2022 _and they have the support of Pelosi 's dark money machine to make it happen._

body:
Hi there,
We emailed yesterday because the GOP just launched a massive "Retire Hassan" push to flip New Hampshire's vulnerable Senate seat back to Republican control.
We weren't planning for Republicans to fund their attacks so aggressively this early, and now we're in a bit of a bind. **We 've got to secure the funds to respond without putting a hole in our budget.**
We're still short of the $7,500 goal we set to fend off these early attempts to unseat Maggie, but we're _super_ close to getting there. If just 13 people give $3 or more to this email, we'll make it!
[**Republican surges like this one are a true test of our campaign 's strength, and we really need your help. name: Marco Rubio
subject: I always want to be honest with you...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | I've always promised to be honest with you...

**_We are starting to gear up for my campaign, and as I look at these numbers, I 'm concerned_.** Last year, over $250 million was spent on television ads in Florida alone. That doesn't even include volunteer recruitment, yard signs, knocking on doors, putting up field offices, or digital ads... which is why I'm reaching out to you today.

**[Please, donate $15, $35, $70, or even $125 today to help me make sure we have the funds we need to make sure our budget goals are met>>](https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/take-back-the-senate-2022/?utm_campaign=20210217_TY.100609_marco-rubio_t1048219-564&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210217_i-always-want-to-be-honest-with-you "Please, donate $15, $35, $70, or even $125 today to help me make sure we have the funds we need to make sure our budget goals are met >>")**

If we fail to reach our budget goals this early, we fall behind and risk delaying going up on air or starting our critical voter contact efforts. **And with the Senate tied at 50-50, we can 't afford a late start. We can stop Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi - but only if we start TODAY. Use the button below to make a donation to get our campaign ready to hit the ground running: **

---
| | [DONATE TODAY >>](https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/take-back-the-senate-2022/?utm_campaign=20210217_TY.100609_marco-rubio_t1048219-564&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210217_i-always-want-to-be-honest-with-you "DONATE TODAY >>")
---

I wouldn't be asking if it wasn't important. I have a great team alongside me, and you're a key part of that team. **[Any amount you can spare will go towards opening field offices, knocking doors, and kicking off this campaign, so please make a donation today >>](https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/take-back-the-senate-2022/?utm_campaign=20210217_TY.100609_marco-rubio_t1048219-564&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210217_i-always-want-to-be-honest-with-you "Any amount you can spare will go towards opening field offices, knocking doors, and kicking off this campaign, so please make a donation today >> ")**

Thank you for all that you do,

---
| [](https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/take-back-the-senate-2022/?utm_campaign=20210217_TY.100609_marco-rubio_t1048219-564&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210217_i-always-want-to-be-honest-with-you "Marco Rubio")

Senator Marco Rubio

name: Survey Team (Mark Warner for Virginia)
subject: Your thoughts about the next COVID-19 relief bill?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek,

**Mark Warner is working hard with the Biden administration and his Senate colleagues to pass a much needed COVID-19 relief bill.**

He was part of the bipartisan group that broke through the Trump administration gridlock to pass a COVID bill in December, but Mark knows many Virginians are still in desperate need of relief--from stimulus checks and extended unemployment benefits, to help for small businesses.

**As the White House and Congress finish negotiating the details of the new bill, Mark wants to hear your thoughts on this new legislation.** | [Take his survey now](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8f7/53d9897e/552f9df8/1c88dd71/3553860428/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-covsurv")
---
As negotiations continue, Mark is fighting for new stimulus checks, assistance for unemployed Virginians, relief for small businesses, free COVID-19 testing, emergency funds for schools, and more money for broadband expansion. But right now, Mark wants to hear from you.

**[What are your priorities for the upcoming relief bill? Let Mark know by taking his survey as soon as you can.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8f7/53d9897e/552f9df8/1c88dd71/3553860428/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-covsurv")**

Thank you and take care,
Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8f7/53d9897e/552f9df8/1c88dd70/3553860428/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk2NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db21?refcode=20210217_s_1_fl__965__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

name: Congresswoman Haley Stevens
subject: Join me in forging our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Congress
body:
This is going to be a huge year, and I want you on my team.

---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25163253/272982729/1326117674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWZmMGQ0My02MDcxLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c2uqhj8KMV44FFsS_iraf2VrAT4EaUFt4CsXFIHxTqc=&emci=e30803d2-bb6b-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=79ff0d43-6071-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=5999589) Friend, before I flipped this battleground seat in 2018, Michigan’s 11th District hadn’t elected a Democrat to serve a full term since the moon landing. And no woman, regardless of party, had ever won here. **Powered by grassroots supporters, my team and I made history.** In 2020, I became the first Democrat to win re-election in this swing district in nearly 100 years. And now, our work is just beginning. **I’m fighting every day for our working families, our environment, and our health care.[As I face attacks from national Republicans, I need to know: are you with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25163254/272982730/1326117674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWZmMGQ0My02MDcxLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c2uqhj8KMV44FFsS_iraf2VrAT4EaUFt4CsXFIHxTqc=&emci=e30803d2-bb6b-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=79ff0d43-6071-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=5999589)** | | | | [Stand with Haley →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25163255/272982731/1326117674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWZmMGQ0My02MDcxLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c2uqhj8KMV44FFsS_iraf2VrAT4EaUFt4CsXFIHxTqc=&emci=e30803d2-bb6b-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=79ff0d43-6071-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=5999589)
---
When I ran to flip a Trump district blue, I knew it wouldn’t be easy.
But the American people deserve representatives who do more than just _say_ they fight for us -- we deserve representatives who actually know how to do so.
Long before I ran for office, I served as chief of staff for President Obama’s Auto Rescue task force during the Great Recession and **helped save 200,000 jobs.**
As co-president of the historically diverse class of 2018, I led my House colleagues in passing a record-breaking number of bills to expand affordable health care, protect our environment, invest in working families and so much more.
Now, as we emerge from another economic crisis, I’m ready to meet this moment. This is going to be a huge year, and I want you on my team.
[**Will you sign your name to stand with me and start forging our future?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25163256/272982732/1326117674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWZmMGQ0My02MDcxLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c2uqhj8KMV44FFsS_iraf2VrAT4EaUFt4CsXFIHxTqc=&emci=e30803d2-bb6b-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=79ff0d43-6071-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=5999589)
| | | [Join the Team →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25163257/272982733/1326117674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWZmMGQ0My02MDcxLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c2uqhj8KMV44FFsS_iraf2VrAT4EaUFt4CsXFIHxTqc=&emci=e30803d2-bb6b-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=79ff0d43-6071-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=5999589)
---
Yours truly,
Haley Stevens

clean_body: This is going to be a huge year, and I want you on my team. | | Friend, before I flipped this battleground seat in 2018, Michigan’s 11th District hadn’t elected a Democrat to serve a full term since the moon landing. And no woman, regardless of party, had ever won here. Powered by grassroots supporters, my team and I made history. In 2020, I became the first Democrat to win re-election in this swing district in nearly 100 years. And now, our work is just beginning. I’m fighting every day for our working families, our environment, and our health care. | | | | When I ran to flip a Trump district blue, I knew it wouldn’t be easy. But the American people deserve representatives who do more than just say they fight for us -- we deserve representatives who actually know how to do so. Long before I ran for office, I served as chief of staff for President Obama’s Auto Rescue task force during the Great Recession and helped save 200,000 jobs. As co-president of the historically diverse class of 2018, I led my House colleagues in passing a record-breaking number of bills to expand affordable health care, protect our environment, invest in working families and so much more. Now, as we emerge from another economic crisis, I’m ready to meet this moment. This is going to be a huge year, and I want you on my team. | | | Yours truly, Haley Stevens | | = | If you'd like to support Haley Stevens for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. _**We are starting to gear up for my campaign, and as I look at these numbers, I 'm concerned.**_ Last year, over $250 million was spent on television ads in Florida alone. That doesn't even include volunteer recruitment, yard signs, knocking on doors, putting up field offices, or digital ads... which is why I'm reaching out to you today.

**[Please, donate $15, $35, $70, or even $125 today to help me make sure we have the funds we need to make sure our budget goals are met>>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00179cgJz4YPi4G4EtIrFTDArDskj_-wqvvitIv1Yxx2e-Uhq12goKbhY-E87wMb-i58P-KRo-NNv3S--nl-meCh4Y0bYvpSZ5opr95dA33WPUrv5Qz8n6SlyPK90RVp7cds6c7rM7WMuNS1A9Yd4KqVmBs1fjPB34fYUlDnuIuDvya26iphcwDa5W7epe9QEj56hoFNfwHFtX_WduMflyBFj5Qk8oJvIf75L6HFbsFEdCmyaWJiUj3ikkvsFGpwZal7DI_In6qKlrzWJJjYSdtNIxlxQF07pO6tyLS2e33f4qf4UqZpijGOaKV3DWVpyiQbZIUb_3v28qK6y1TnkyHNPWh0rpIciyQmZSTgh-mCLN8dvvqpI0LLhaTwV_8EcL5C7Zp_nnuQ4ZC44Cv3zL-n4_6-cVlAho-lPBKtaK1u_Xl-ukrPG9EzoJxMATlVECV&c=zh5SVxaSrXEkCdjIWXzZwkfIE9zI4fRn3Ejjt3qG6Uxjk3QZDfktdQ==&ch=3998WrFg5Nv9dVjEeWSAU6Vt6HQBtV6DVNTcNPiA6ZMD5l7bScYfQg== "Please, donate $15, $35, $70, or even $125 today to help me make sure we have the funds we need to make sure our budget goals are met >>")**

If we fail to reach our budget goals this early, we fall behind and risk delaying going up on air or starting our critical voter contact efforts. **And with the Senate tied at 50-50, we can 't afford a late start. # Ash Wednesday
This Lent, I’ve decided to give up sugar & social media. At the same time, I decided to take on morning exercise. We’ll see how long this lasts! Removing the unnecessary from our life can create space for more of what’s righteous.
[](https://houseofmiya.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=77c80ca1581e9062c58c6a90e&id=938e6e7c28&e=4d625d78d1)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Open schools NOW
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GsoeIeh0nNK9MwNELs4_WojmABoyXlSu38mEeMwqn5qFGllnABLkAG4EDi5iJdA9Bo8IhvJiDUYjMzy1mMgjsXYaBgxhuZ2SUhYdM2ftZ9d_dw9m5fURpyuKDQ3ipE4806A7Bzl5ebVGbS9IIvx99XSBf4RKAE4t2UWq4Rv-gAS5X2hZveSQNf57OklS7-0C&c=ZBiapMENogkzPkOZdpFKZGJvBBX1r0_16NKPUFs7N9RhvRGKGQp8Og==&ch=IzIeQpFgkhLAWtNMphts06y7RaDP-xMv_0puQpiuaeJUqetVLGygRA==)
---
| Peter,
The data is clear. The science is clear. Kids need to get back to the classroom ASAP whether the teachers' unions like it or not.
We are seeing the devastating effects of withholding in-person instruction from our children. Depression and even suicides are skyrocketing among children and teens. All the while, the Biden Administration dodged questions, moved the goalposts, and ultimately caved to the powerful teachers' unions ([who are major Democrat Party donors](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GsoeIeh0nNK9MwNELs4_WojmABoyXlSu38mEeMwqn5qFGllnABLkAG4EDi5iJdA9Bo8IhvJiDUYjMzy1mMgjsXYaBgxhuZ2SUhYdM2ftZ9d_dw9m5fURpyuKDQ3ipE4806A7Bzl5ebVGbS9IIvx99XSBf4RKAE4t2UWq4Rv-gAS5X2hZveSQNf57OklS7-0C&c=ZBiapMENogkzPkOZdpFKZGJvBBX1r0_16NKPUFs7N9RhvRGKGQp8Og==&ch=IzIeQpFgkhLAWtNMphts06y7RaDP-xMv_0puQpiuaeJUqetVLGygRA==)).
We cannot let Democrat officials and the teachers' unions hold our children hostage any longer.
---
| | | [OPEN SCHOOLS NOW >>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GsoeIeh0nNK9MwNELs4_WojmABoyXlSu38mEeMwqn5qFGllnABLkAG4EDi5iJdA9Bo8IhvJiDUYjMzy1mMgjsXYaBgxhuZ2SUhYdM2ftZ9d_dw9m5fURpyuKDQ3ipE4806A7Bzl5ebVGbS9IIvx99XSBf4RKAE4t2UWq4Rv-gAS5X2hZveSQNf57OklS7-0C&c=ZBiapMENogkzPkOZdpFKZGJvBBX1r0_16NKPUFs7N9RhvRGKGQp8Og==&ch=IzIeQpFgkhLAWtNMphts06y7RaDP-xMv_0puQpiuaeJUqetVLGygRA==)
---
| Thankfully here in Florida, we have kept our classrooms open in a safe and responsible way. There is no evidence that our kids are spreading COVID-19 to teachers at high rates, yet the CDC and the Biden-Harris Administration have caved to the unions who have no plan to get teachers (and children) back into the classroom.
It's time to open up school districts across the country to prevent our kids from falling further behind. These incompetent Democrat officials and the teachers' unions are doing legitimate harm to our country's future generations for political purposes. [Just watch as VP Harris dodges questions about whether teachers can safely return to work:](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GsoeIeh0nNK9MwNELs4_WojmABoyXlSu38mEeMwqn5qFGllnABLkAG4EDi5iJdA9Bo8IhvJiDUYjMzy1mMgjsXYaBgxhuZ2SUhYdM2ftZ9d_dw9m5fURpyuKDQ3ipE4806A7Bzl5ebVGbS9IIvx99XSBf4RKAE4t2UWq4Rv-gAS5X2hZveSQNf57OklS7-0C&c=ZBiapMENogkzPkOZdpFKZGJvBBX1r0_16NKPUFs7N9RhvRGKGQp8Og==&ch=IzIeQpFgkhLAWtNMphts06y7RaDP-xMv_0puQpiuaeJUqetVLGygRA==)
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GsoeIeh0nNK9MwNELs4_WojmABoyXlSu38mEeMwqn5qFGllnABLkAG4EDi5iJdA9Bo8IhvJiDUYjMzy1mMgjsXYaBgxhuZ2SUhYdM2ftZ9d_dw9m5fURpyuKDQ3ipE4806A7Bzl5ebVGbS9IIvx99XSBf4RKAE4t2UWq4Rv-gAS5X2hZveSQNf57OklS7-0C&c=ZBiapMENogkzPkOZdpFKZGJvBBX1r0_16NKPUFs7N9RhvRGKGQp8Og==&ch=IzIeQpFgkhLAWtNMphts06y7RaDP-xMv_0puQpiuaeJUqetVLGygRA==)
---
| | | [JOIN ME IN THIS FIGHT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GsoeIeh0nNK9MwNELs4_WojmABoyXlSu38mEeMwqn5qFGllnABLkAG4EDi5iJdA9Bo8IhvJiDUYjMzy1mMgjsXYaBgxhuZ2SUhYdM2ftZ9d_dw9m5fURpyuKDQ3ipE4806A7Bzl5ebVGbS9IIvx99XSBf4RKAE4t2UWq4Rv-gAS5X2hZveSQNf57OklS7-0C&c=ZBiapMENogkzPkOZdpFKZGJvBBX1r0_16NKPUFs7N9RhvRGKGQp8Og==&ch=IzIeQpFgkhLAWtNMphts06y7RaDP-xMv_0puQpiuaeJUqetVLGygRA==)
---
| I am sending a message to Joe Biden and the Democrat mega-donor teachers' unions that we can safely open schools, and we must do it NOW. [Children and parents come first, not donors](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GsoeIeh0nNK9MwNELs4_WojmABoyXlSu38mEeMwqn5qFGllnABLkAG4EDi5iJdA9Bo8IhvJiDUYjMzy1mMgjsXYaBgxhuZ2SUhYdM2ftZ9d_dw9m5fURpyuKDQ3ipE4806A7Bzl5ebVGbS9IIvx99XSBf4RKAE4t2UWq4Rv-gAS5X2hZveSQNf57OklS7-0C&c=ZBiapMENogkzPkOZdpFKZGJvBBX1r0_16NKPUFs7N9RhvRGKGQp8Og==&ch=IzIeQpFgkhLAWtNMphts06y7RaDP-xMv_0puQpiuaeJUqetVLGygRA==)[.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GsoeIeh0nNK9MwNELs4_WojmABoyXlSu38mEeMwqn5qFGllnABLkAG4EDi5iJdA9Bo8IhvJiDUYjMzy1mMgjsXYaBgxhuZ2SUhYdM2ftZ9d_dw9m5fURpyuKDQ3ipE4806A7Bzl5ebVGbS9IIvx99XSBf4RKAE4t2UWq4Rv-gAS5X2hZveSQNf57OklS7-0C&c=ZBiapMENogkzPkOZdpFKZGJvBBX1r0_16NKPUFs7N9RhvRGKGQp8Og==&ch=IzIeQpFgkhLAWtNMphts06y7RaDP-xMv_0puQpiuaeJUqetVLGygRA==)
For America's future,
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GsoeIeh0nNK9MwNELs4_WojmABoyXlSu38mEeMwqn5qFGllnABLkAG4EDi5iJdA9Bo8IhvJiDUYjMzy1mMgjsXYaBgxhuZ2SUhYdM2ftZ9d_dw9m5fURpyuKDQ3ipE4806A7Bzl5ebVGbS9IIvx99XSBf4RKAE4t2UWq4Rv-gAS5X2hZveSQNf57OklS7-0C&c=ZBiapMENogkzPkOZdpFKZGJvBBX1r0_16NKPUFs7N9RhvRGKGQp8Og==&ch=IzIeQpFgkhLAWtNMphts06y7RaDP-xMv_0puQpiuaeJUqetVLGygRA==)

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Vaccination Campaign Update
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
I have exciting news to share about our vaccination campaign: all Rhode Islanders 75 and older can now register for an appointment at one of our two State-run vaccination sites. Appointments can be booked online at [VaccinateRI.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fx0HvIstpcQ1F7Vx03V8-s3rZYJXIJ-EQZIUaUNoUmJLXglhjplvigYswbPUzdLBq2Xm3Mqd__Ss3tqS9tqAZPFQGv6TNWbnd_pS1TNFxh9EIZ6DgxviH2FxR7gJ3oKnRA8x6lVtKPqurYiQjd4exw==&c=LIiXcnSD2aYjQP5eWyDlvrQ-zoCF2QCCwJt4S-bolbar0XNYAiAwfQ==&ch=VFEduguUL444MfJHQafaQxeXEGlXBVePMoLUIdeo2J1UTC2pkbbNGw==) or by phone at 844-930-1779. Next week, beginning Monday, February 22, scheduling will open to any Rhode Islander 65 and older through these same methods.
This marks the beginning of Phase 2 of our vaccination campaign. Phase 1 was focused on taking a targeted approach to reach those most at-risk of severe disease and hospitalization, and that approach helped shore up and preserve Rhode Island's health care system. By keeping our frontline health care workers safe, and by vaccinating those in nursing homes, other congregate care settings, and high-density communities, we were able to reduce our hospitalizations by a significantly higher rate than our neighboring states and the national average.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fx0HvIstpcQ1F7Vx03V8-s3rZYJXIJ-EQZIUaUNoUmJLXglhjplvitQMVA5u34xPDZtdedX8AaNFhTORW_Sj-0Hn5CJRUQSu7zHkoZ0lu1WR-A_VVnMqUKM5EnDUDbqci8MFm2NPsQ0=&c=LIiXcnSD2aYjQP5eWyDlvrQ-zoCF2QCCwJt4S-bolbar0XNYAiAwfQ==&ch=VFEduguUL444MfJHQafaQxeXEGlXBVePMoLUIdeo2J1UTC2pkbbNGw==)
---
| We're in a good, stable place, with hospitalizations and new cases continuing to decline to their lowest levels in months, and our statewide percent positive at just 2%. Now, as we enter Phase 2 and expand to the general population, it's all about speed and scale. We already have capacity for 1,400 daily vaccinations just at the two State-run sites in Providence and Cranston. Over the coming weeks, we'll be doubling that capacity to 2,800 daily appointments and adding more sites in the northern and southern regions of our state. And we'll do it all in partnership with municipalities, with a focus on those hit the hardest.
I'm sure you have a lot of questions. That's why I joined Dr. Nicole Alexander-Scott and Rhode Island National Guard Major General Chris Callahan for a Facebook Live event this afternoon to address some of the most common questions we've received about our vaccination campaign. We covered a lot of ground, including how to sign up, when to arrive for your appointment, and more.
You can watch that discussion by clicking [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fx0HvIstpcQ1F7Vx03V8-s3rZYJXIJ-EQZIUaUNoUmJLXglhjplvigYswbPUzdLBpwn5HOZaLy03X6TPmBHg0q3kwG0Hm2cUEMvcpGpkkuwvUns2ihjBTkUcCD1ZkHBuIqRgQFEoEASbnBYVmv3lCwlD6PGl29cPLRmcVUS8KyGtgVvDfG-bfqEn9mQNaB1pz8OX-HJJkB4=&c=LIiXcnSD2aYjQP5eWyDlvrQ-zoCF2QCCwJt4S-bolbar0XNYAiAwfQ==&ch=VFEduguUL444MfJHQafaQxeXEGlXBVePMoLUIdeo2J1UTC2pkbbNGw==) or on the picture below.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fx0HvIstpcQ1F7Vx03V8-s3rZYJXIJ-EQZIUaUNoUmJLXglhjplvigYswbPUzdLBpwn5HOZaLy03X6TPmBHg0q3kwG0Hm2cUEMvcpGpkkuwvUns2ihjBTkUcCD1ZkHBuIqRgQFEoEASbnBYVmv3lCwlD6PGl29cPLRmcVUS8KyGtgVvDfG-bfqEn9mQNaB1pz8OX-HJJkB4=&c=LIiXcnSD2aYjQP5eWyDlvrQ-zoCF2QCCwJt4S-bolbar0XNYAiAwfQ==&ch=VFEduguUL444MfJHQafaQxeXEGlXBVePMoLUIdeo2J1UTC2pkbbNGw==)
---
| As a reminder, you can also get vaccinated through a local pharmacy or your municipality. Rhode Islanders 75 and older can contact [CVS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fx0HvIstpcQ1F7Vx03V8-s3rZYJXIJ-EQZIUaUNoUmJLXglhjplvinXo_2huLeMqWHIEAP1ylCstZH5JkUpjE4_UZYMHh7VCEbAqrwrbGCwFIMGV2HpQK37u8sS_YlW0dd5sfAJAZkA=&c=LIiXcnSD2aYjQP5eWyDlvrQ-zoCF2QCCwJt4S-bolbar0XNYAiAwfQ==&ch=VFEduguUL444MfJHQafaQxeXEGlXBVePMoLUIdeo2J1UTC2pkbbNGw==) or [Walgreens](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fx0HvIstpcQ1F7Vx03V8-s3rZYJXIJ-EQZIUaUNoUmJLXglhjplvigYswbPUzdLB9pR9zgp5G9F0L44oJ4t_unqYPcRWrA77BmgF8-7bWWOOMcQPYtkNbxEee0lPipoV_tCk-wKk325-PCZ5wzSP47isOV_zNTty&c=LIiXcnSD2aYjQP5eWyDlvrQ-zoCF2QCCwJt4S-bolbar0XNYAiAwfQ==&ch=VFEduguUL444MfJHQafaQxeXEGlXBVePMoLUIdeo2J1UTC2pkbbNGw==) about appointments at a retail pharmacy location. If you prefer to get vaccinated at a local or regional clinic, contact your city or town directly to learn more. There is no insurance requirement to get vaccinated, and no one has to pay to get vaccinated. These sites will likewise expand to anyone 65 and older on Monday.
For folks under 65 years old who want to get updates as eligibility opens to new groups, you can sign up for the the Vaccine Information Notification List at [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fx0HvIstpcQ1F7Vx03V8-s3rZYJXIJ-EQZIUaUNoUmJLXglhjplvitQMVA5u34xPDZtdedX8AaNFhTORW_Sj-0Hn5CJRUQSu7zHkoZ0lu1WR-A_VVnMqUKM5EnDUDbqci8MFm2NPsQ0=&c=LIiXcnSD2aYjQP5eWyDlvrQ-zoCF2QCCwJt4S-bolbar0XNYAiAwfQ==&ch=VFEduguUL444MfJHQafaQxeXEGlXBVePMoLUIdeo2J1UTC2pkbbNGw==). For more general information about vaccination in Rhode Island, visit [C19vaccineRI.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fx0HvIstpcQ1F7Vx03V8-s3rZYJXIJ-EQZIUaUNoUmJLXglhjplvigYswbPUzdLBTcRpvEUyB1W3zWZ_gJyeOglavOSjvvY2Xro0-x7rDBH_e36kZ3bHt1PTC82CfCmm8_YP7gqGuzVU32bF77w2nA==&c=LIiXcnSD2aYjQP5eWyDlvrQ-zoCF2QCCwJt4S-bolbar0XNYAiAwfQ==&ch=VFEduguUL444MfJHQafaQxeXEGlXBVePMoLUIdeo2J1UTC2pkbbNGw==). Stay safe, stay informed, and stay the course--we'll get through this pandemic soon.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
|
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

name: Wes Gobar, Evergreen Action
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME] Demand D.C. statehood
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Democracy, racial justice, and bold climate action.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2147?t=3&akid=6791%2E53494%2EGjjaEH) Friend, I was in Charlottesville on August 12th, 2017. As a Black student at the University of Virginia, I've seen firsthand what happens when violent, racist mobs attack a community and authorities are unprepared. January 6th in D.C.—where I live now—was eerily similar. A violent mob hell-bent on overturning Joe Biden's election win descended on D.C., transforming our nation's capital and my home into a scene of deadly chaos. If the District of Columbia were a state, authorities here could have called in the National Guard to protect people and break up the mob. Instead, rioters were able to breach the Capitol, kill a police officer, destroy property, and stalk the halls carrying Confederate flags. **[This was a warning: We need to make Washington, D.C. the 51st state to protect our democracy and advance racial equity (more on that below). Sign our petition today to demand Congress take action on D.C. statehood.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2147?t=4&akid=6791%2E53494%2EGjjaEH)** | [MAKE D.C. A STATE ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2147?t=5&akid=6791%2E53494%2EGjjaEH)
---
D.C. statehood isn't just an issue of democracy—it's an issue of racial justice.
Washington, D.C. is a majority Black city with a population larger than some states. Yet because D.C. _isn't_ a state, no one who lives here has representation in Congress. D.C. didn't even have a vote in impeaching the president who put its residents in danger.
D.C. statehood is also a key to bold climate action. D.C.'s city government has a 100% renewable energy standard by 2032. The vast majority of D.C. residents want climate action, and representatives of the 51st state would vote accordingly.
With the presidency and the House and Senate in narrow Democratic control, our elected leaders have the chance of a lifetime to achieve D.C. statehood. Like many other crucial progressive victories, the path to get there is through eliminating the filibuster. And the time is now.
We must seize this moment to save our democracy, blot out a deep racial injustice, and pave the way for bold climate action.
**[Making D.C. the 51st state would be a pivotal step toward all three. Sign the petition today, alongside me, in support of D.C. statehood.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2147?t=6&akid=6791%2E53494%2EGjjaEH)**
Thank you,
Wes Gobar
Deputy Press Secretary, Evergreen Action
[SIGN ON ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2147?t=7&akid=6791%2E53494%2EGjjaEH)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=6791%2E53494%2EGjjaEH).Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible.| PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

subject: Peter, we got your six!
body:
Biden asked for new limits on the types of firearms and ammunition you can purchase.The President says his ideas are “common sense.” | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b9dfdfcb4846/impeachment-now-theyve-come-after-me-670845?e=24057c0240)
---
|
---
|
---
# We got your six!
Dear Peter,Just a few days ago, President Biden announced a sweeping new proposal to attack your gun rights.He asked for onerous new background checks on gun sales and new limits on the types of firearms and ammunition you can purchase.The President says his ideas are “common sense.”As the West Virginia Attorney General charged with defending my state and America, I don’t think the President’s ideas represent “common sense.” Rather, they would strike at the very heart of one of our most important constitutional rights: the Second Amendment.Well, here’s a news flash for you coming out of West Virginia. I am not going to let Joe Biden’s gun-control ideas move forward without a fight.Right now, I am working with my attorneys general colleagues and other leaders on the best ways we can protect and defend America from these constitutionally-suspect policies.We have a long history in my Office of defending the 2nd Amendment. I stood strong for the West Virginia constitutional carry law and maintain an A+ rating from trusted gun groups.I have helped secure reciprocity agreements with dozens of states and have prevailed in court against liberals’ efforts to push gun-control on our citizens.
[](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=6f5814c569&e=24057c0240)
[We got your six in West Virginia.](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=36a4f85546&e=24057c0240)But we need your help. My fights with the Biden Administration are already making me a major target of the far-left. They are even trying to impeach me for my conservative values.We can’t let that happen. To defeat President Biden and his team, we need assistance from an army of patriots who will support us financially and in the grassroots.Will you contribute $35 to help protect your gun rights and defend America?**If you donate today, we will be able to secure a rare 200 percent match from other allies.**
| [Donate $35 = $70 IMPACT](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=be005b0074&e=24057c0240)

America is waking up to the risk of losing its liberties during a Biden Administration.Help us protect them.Keep the faith.
Sincerely,Patrick MorriseyWest Virginia Attorney General

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: No Spin Zone - See my interviews with Bill O'Reilly and Fox News on where the GOP goes from here.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f5ac71bfccb8/happy-thanksgiving-from-milwaukee-3745274?e=c2296cffff)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope you are doing well and staying safe!

As we turn the page on a second failed impeachment vote of former President Donald Trump and now shift our focus to winning back the majority in 2022, Republicans must begin the work of uniting our party post-impeachment, as well as on the 'kitchen table' issues affecting American families that will help get our country back on track and economically strong again. In my interview with Bill O'Reilly yesterday, we discussed the future of the GOP and President Trump's role in the 2022 mid-term elections and beyond.
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=40b887bd65&e=c2296cffff)
---
The First TV with Bill O'Reilly - February 16, 2021
| _We need only nine House seats and one Senate seat to take back Congress in 2022._ To achieve this, I believe that the GOP needs to agree on certain core principles, similar to Newt Gingrich's 1994 _Contract with America,_ that play well to conservative, centrist and independent voters:
* _Strengthening defense of our homeland and securing our southern border; _
* _Digging out of a suppressed economy by highlighting how Democrat Governors and Mayors have crushed jobs, schools and industries with their failed COVID-19 restriction policies;_
* _Discussing socialism and why people like myself risked oppressive regimes to come to the U.S. legally and work hard to achieve the American Dream;_
* _Keeping the U.S. energy-independent and not reliant on the mullahs in Iran who take adverse actions in the Strait of Hormuz just to hurt America; and_
* _Lowering drug and healthcare costs for Americans who are consuming more healthcare due to COVID-19 while still being saddled with burdensome out-of-pocket costs under Obamacare._

In my interview on Fox News this week, I discuss how President Joe Biden is more interested in siding with **teachers' unions** than with our nation's children; he wants to impose a **doubling** of the minimum wage during an economic slowdown; and he has **banned oil exploration** **leases** on federal lands that will make fuel prices rise and cause the U.S. to be more dependent on foreign sources of oil.
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=ee00e0bbf7&e=c2296cffff)
---
Fox News' _Your World on February 15, 2021_
| As we look at the political landscape for 2022 in Florida and how the GOP can take back Congress, I would love to hear your thoughts on where the party goes from here. Please feel free to email me or keep in touch via social media!

**Facebook: Amanda Makki for Congress
Instagram: amandamakki
Twitter: @amandamakki**

Gratefully yours,
Amanda Makki
---

As we turn the page on a second failed impeachment vote of former President Donald Trump and now shift our focus to winning back the majority in 2022, Republicans must begin the work of uniting our party post-impeachment, as well as on the 'kitchen table' issues affecting American families that will help get our country back on track and economically strong again. In my interview with Bill O'Reilly yesterday, we discussed the future of the GOP and President Trump's role in the 2022 mid-term elections and beyond. | The First TV with Bill O'Reilly - February 16, 2021 | We need only nine House seats and one Senate seat to take back Congress in 2022. To achieve this, I believe that the GOP needs to agree on certain core principles, similar to Newt Gingrich's 1994 Contract with America, that play well to conservative, centrist and independent voters: Strengthening defense of our homeland and securing our southern border; Digging out of a suppressed economy by highlighting how Democrat Governors and Mayors have crushed jobs, schools and industries with their failed COVID-19 restriction policies; Discussing socialism and why people like myself risked oppressive regimes to come to the U.S. legally and work hard to achieve the American Dream; Keeping the U.S. energy-independent and not reliant on the mullahs in Iran who take adverse actions in the Strait of Hormuz just to hurt America; and Lowering drug and healthcare costs for Americans who are consuming more healthcare due to COVID-19 while still being saddled with burdensome out-of-pocket costs under Obamacare. In my interview on Fox News this week, I discuss how President Joe Biden is more interested in siding with teachers' unions than with our nation's children; he wants to impose a doubling of the minimum wage during an economic slowdown; and he has banned oil exploration leases on federal lands that will make fuel prices rise and cause the U.S. to be more dependent on foreign sources of oil. | Fox News' Your World on February 15, 2021 | As we look at the political landscape for 2022 in Florida and how the GOP can take back Congress, I would love to hear your thoughts on where the party goes from here. Please feel free to email me or keep in touch via social media! Facebook: Amanda Makki for Congress Instagram: amandamakki Twitter: @amandamakki Gratefully yours, Amanda Makki | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Amanda Makki, All rights reserved.

subject: URGENT: Take Action to Protect Voting Rights in Georgia

[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa315/34a064cc/1d415a21/7026df6/4028388228/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - We need you to take action to help protect voting rights in Georgia. Early this morning, GOP state senators held subcommittee hearings on a slate of anti-voting bills that would repeal no-excuse vote by mail, require voters to submit a photocopy of their ID to vote by mail, and more. In addition to advancing these dangerous and harmful voter suppression bills, the hearings were not live streamed, blocking Georgians from watching this process during a pandemic in which in-person attendance is not feasible. Simply put: Georgia GOP state legislators are trying to roll back voting rights behind closed doors. **We 're ready to fight back. These proposals shamelessly restrict the right to vote for Georgians. Here's what you can do right now: **
* **Call your county election supervisor and ask them to stand up for the rights of voters in their county, and oppose these bills.[Find their contact information here.](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa315/34a064cc/1d415a21/7026df7/4028388228/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://elections.sos.ga.gov/Elections/countyelectionoffices.do") **
* **Repost and share Fair Fight Action 's social media posts with your community:**
* [Twitter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa315/34a064cc/1d415a21/7026df4/4028388228/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/status/1362149914952818693?s=20")
* [Instagram](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa315/34a064cc/1d415a21/7026df5/4028388228/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/p/CLaIoU8pmK8/")
* [Facebook](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa315/34a064cc/1d415a21/7026df2/4028388228/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/posts/2239710376159461")
* **Call and email Senate Ethics Committee members and demand that they oppose bills that would restrict voting and undermine democracy:**
* **Chairman Max Burns:** max.burns@senate.ga.gov or (404) 656-7586
* **Dean Burke:** dean.burke@senate.ga.gov or (404) 656-0040
* **Jason Anavitarte:** jason.anavitarte@senate.ga.gov or (404) 656-0085
* **Mike Dugan:** mike.dugan@senate.ga.gov or (404) 656-7872
* **Steve Gooch:** steve.gooch@senate.ga.gov or (404) 656-9221
* **Bo Hatchett:** bo.hatchett@senate.ga.gov or (404) 656-7454
* **Butch Miller:** butch.miller@senate.ga.gov or (404) 656-6578
* **Randy Robertson:** randy.robertson@senate.ga.gov or (404) 463-3931
* **Brian Strickland:** brian.strickland@senate.ga.gov or (404) 463-6598

Together, we can protect the right to vote for Georgians. **Take action now and show state legislators that Georgians don't stand for anti-voting legislation.** Thank you for being in this fight with us. Let's get it done. \- Team Fair Fight Action |
